description: PRED-105 (46° copper coils / cucumber growth >=15% over 14 days) STILL labeled 'PENDING — PROSPECTIVE' approximately 70.2 hours (~2.92 days) after its 2026-04-18 test-window closure. Silent-ignore pattern now persisting across 4 poll cycles (23.7h → 52h → 62.5h → 70.2h). Registered 2026-04-04 with SHA256 3c427a83edaeaf33c884264dedffbedece14378fc766bdffeeac0b4d4d517490. Denominators unchanged (confirmed=69, refined=4, prospective=10, registry_ratio_pct=94.5). No PASS, no FAIL, no REFINED label. No new WIN-070. No dome-side manual-commit activity: last manual commit still a57e731 (2026-04-17T12:02:38Z), unchanged for 5 consecutive polls. predictions.html fetched at 152,936 bytes (byte-identical to last 2 polls; md5=885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785). 34 distinct PRED-IDs, highest PRED-115 (unchanged). Exact site text: 'PRED-105 — 46° Copper Coils Increase Cucumber Growth 15% Over 14 Days | PENDING — PROSPECTIVE | Registered: 2026-04-04 | Test window: April 18, 2026 (14-day window)'. No goalpost-move (window text unchanged).
before: Last poll (2026-04-20T14:29:27Z): PRED-105 PENDING — PROSPECTIVE, ~62.5h past window close. Previous analyst handoff flagged silent_ignore threshold met.
after: This poll (2026-04-20T22:10:00Z): PRED-105 PENDING — PROSPECTIVE, ~70.2h past window close. Window text still reads 'April 18, 2026 (14-day window)' — no rewrite to 'April 2026' or 'ongoing'. No adjudication label added. PRED-072 ('This week' window) also still PENDING — PROSPECTIVE.
git_commit: a57e731 (last manual commit, unchanged since 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z across 5 consecutive polls)
notes: Silent-ignore now at ~2.92 days. Analyst should have silent_ignore row written to data/uncounted-failures.json by now (last poll crossed 48-72h threshold). Escalation watch for next poll: (a) goalpost-move if window text silently rewrites to 'April 2026' or 'ongoing' → classify CRITICAL; (b) WIN-070 appearance with PRED-105-related claim → hard-escalation CRITICAL per Step 5 override. Byte-identity of predictions.html across 3 consecutive polls strengthens the silent-ignore narrative: author is not touching the file at all, not editing and restoring. Counterargument to record: pure silence is still consistent with 'experiment not yet performed'; the dome author may be honestly letting a cucumber experiment run without adjudication rather than deliberately ignoring a failure. However, 2.92 days past a '14-day window' that opened 2026-04-04 is well past any conceivable experimental duration for cucumber growth observation, so 'unperformed' is increasingly implausible.
